evals.prompt: Set up an iterative design project for a SaaS landing page. Create the initial .op directory structure with PROJECT.md and DESIGN.md, then start the loop with a hero section design.
evals.expected_output: Creates .op directory with all required files (PROJECT.md, DESIGN.md, next-prompt.md, metadata.json) and generates the first hero design using OpenPencil

evals.prompt: I have an existing .op project. Continue the loop by reading the next-prompt.md and generate the pricing section design.
evals.expected_output: Reads the baton, generates the pricing design using op CLI, exports assets, updates metadata, and prepares the next baton for the following iteration

evals.prompt: Build a multi-page mobile app design using the loop pattern. Start with a login screen, then iterate to create a dashboard screen.
evals.expected_output: Sets up mobile dimensions (375x812), generates login screen, properly updates baton for dashboard iteration, demonstrating multi-iteration capability
